titles.en: Noble and ignoble behaviors under hunger and satiation
Noble and ignoble behaviors under hunger and satiation

segments: ٤٩. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): احْذَرُوا صَوْلَةَ الْكَرِيمِ إذَا جَاعَ، واللَّئِيمِ إِذَا شَبِعَ.
arabic.text: ٤٩. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): احْذَرُوا صَوْلَةَ الْكَرِيمِ إذَا جَاعَ، واللَّئِيمِ إِذَا شَبِعَ.

segments: 49. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Fear the attack of a noble person when he is hungry, and that of an ignoble person when he is satiated. [1]
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 49. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Fear the attack of a noble person when he is hungry, and that of an ignoble person when he is satiated. [1]
